allow: Bash(cat ~/.claude.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('mcpServers', {}\), indent=2\)\)")
Bash(curl -s http://localhost:6006/index.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k\) for k in d.get\('entries', {}\).keys\(\)]" 2>/dev/null | head -50)
